purpose: Complete canonical inventory of root authority bypass paths across all governed boundaries. Non-operative. Does not create authority, execution, merge permission, proof, or deployment. Consolidates and extends RESIDUAL_BYPASS_MATRIX.json with all root authority surfaces from ROOT_AUTHORITY_INVENTORY.json.
bypass_path_invariant: Every bypass path entry represents an observability and containment classification. The existence of a bypass path does not authorize use. Detection of bypass path use forces LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch.

bypass_paths.name: Cloudflare Git Integration automatic deploy
preconditions: Cloudflare Git Integration enabled at account level
Push to tracked branch (main or equivalent)
bypass_paths.observability: EXTERNAL_ONLY — Cloudflare dashboard deploy log only; not bound to MindShift proof registry
bypass_paths.closure_condition: Cloudflare Git Integration disabled at account level — account administrator action required
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Any deploy via this path forces LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch

bypass_paths.name: Direct wrangler deploy via CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
bypass_paths.observability: PARTIAL — Cloudflare dashboard deploy log; not bound to MindShift proof registry
bypass_paths.closure_condition: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN scoped to GitHub Actions OIDC only; no static token capable of production deploy
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Deploy via this path forces LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch unless executed through governed workflow

bypass_paths.name: Local governed-deploy.ts with valid token and fabricated canonical artifact
preconditions: Fabricated legitimacy artifact with valid canonical chain responses (must hit live /session through /proof endpoints)
bypass_paths.observability: AUDIT_LOG — deploy_audit_registry.json entry emitted on all invocations including rejections; Cloudflare dashboard deploy log
bypass_paths.closure_condition: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN scoped to GitHub Actions OIDC only — no local token means no local deploy
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Requires both token AND canonical chain completion; residual local root authority path classified and monitored

bypass_paths.name: GitHub admin workflow modification and admin-merged bypass
preconditions: Ability to bypass branch protection or merge without PREO
bypass_paths.observability: GitHub audit log; constitutional-integrity.yml detects workflow changes as PR-3_SOVEREIGNTY drift
bypass_paths.closure_condition: Branch protection enforcement at repository level; admin bypass policy disabled
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Admin bypass of merge governance forces LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected merge epoch

bypass_paths.name: GitHub repository secrets mutation — MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL or token redirect
preconditions: GitHub repository admin or environments admin access
Ability to mutate MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL, MINDSHIFT_API_KEY, or CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secrets
bypass_paths.observability: GitHub audit log only — MindShift has no internal visibility into secret mutation events
bypass_paths.closure_condition: Secret write authority restricted to designated administrators; secret rotation and integrity policy enforced
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Secret mutation outside governed change management invalidates all deploy epochs that used the mutated secrets

bypass_paths.name: Branch protection bypass merge
preconditions: Repository admin or operator with branch protection override capability
Ability to merge without required PREO reviews or status checks
bypass_paths.observability: GitHub audit log and pull request event log; merge-governance-check.yml detects unprotected merges
bypass_paths.closure_condition: Branch protection rules enforced with no admin override; all merges require PREO and status checks
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Branch protection bypass forces LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected merge epoch

bypass_paths.name: Canonical serialization code mutation outside governed change
preconditions: Commit access to governance or canonical serialization code paths
Merge without PREO or CODEOWNERS review
bypass_paths.observability: Git commit history; CODEOWNERS review requirement; constitutional-integrity.yml
bypass_paths.closure_condition: CODEOWNERS enforcement on all governance and serialization paths; required PREO review for any governance mutation
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Serialization code mutation outside governed pipeline must be treated as legitimacy identity mutation and forces NULL for subsequent epochs

bypass_paths.name: Federation evidence treated as legitimacy authority
preconditions: Federation evidence available from external source
Attempt to use federation evidence to override local legitimacy determination
bypass_paths.observability: Audit-time detection — governance documents and audit spec define that federation evidence is EVIDENCE_ONLY
bypass_paths.closure_condition: Federation evidence permanently classified as EVIDENCE_ONLY; no execution path that treats federation evidence as authoritative
bypass_paths.legitimacy_effect: Treating federation evidence as authoritative forces LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch

bypass_closure_requirements: RBP-001: Disable Cloudflare Git Integration at account level — CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED, pending account action
RBP-002: Scope CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to GitHub Actions OIDC only — resolves RBP-003 as well
RBP-003: Resolved by RBP-002 closure (no local static token = no local deploy)
RBP-004: Enforce branch protection with no admin override; monitor via constitutional-integrity.yml
RBP-005: Restrict secret write access; enforce secret rotation and integrity policy
RBP-006: Enforce required PREO and status checks with no bypass path on main branch
RBP-007: Enforce CODEOWNERS and required PREO for all governance mutations
RBP-008: Permanent EVIDENCE_ONLY classification; no authorizing use path
containment_reason: RBP-001 remains CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED — Cloudflare Git Integration disable requires account-level administrative action. All other bypass paths are CLASSIFIED_OPEN with active observability and compensating controls.
observability_requirement: All production mutation events — governed or bypass — must be detectable. RBP-001 and RBP-002 are only visible in Cloudflare dashboard (external observability). RBP-003 is visible in deploy_audit_registry.json. RBP-004 through RBP-007 are visible in GitHub audit log. No production mutation path is fully unobservable.
